name: Real Texas Chili - Tkmhol
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the onions, bell peppers, and jalapeño peppers and set aside.
2. Cut the chuck steak into 1-inch cubes or smaller pieces and set aside.
3. Cut the tomatoes into pieces and set aside.
4. Heat the vegetable oil in an 8-quart saucepan over medium heat.
5. Add the diced onions, bell peppers, and jalapeño peppers to the pan and sauté until browned.
6. Add the cubed chuck steak and sear until browned.
7. Stir in the tomatoes and spices, then cover and simmer until the tomatoes are cooked down.
This will serve about 6 people as a meat dish.
